positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene, highly stylized geometric line art combined with soft gradient watercolor washes. A central grouping of glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and stylized crystalline flora grow among the roots of abstract, gentle trees. The composition features clean, thick black outlines providing a strong silhouette effect against a deep indigo and midnight blue gradient background. Accents of pale gold and electric cyan glow softly from the mushrooms and crystals. Art style inspired by modern Scandinavian graphic design and botanical illustration, perfect for textile repeat or central placement. Clean edges, high contrast, ethereal, dreamy, symmetry.
negative: photorealistic, realistic, grainy, noisy, blur, jpeg artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, dirty, messy
